wiki.summary: “GODSTAINED” is the lead single off of Quadeca’s album, Vanisher, Horizon Scraper. A snippet of the song was first teased during an Instagram live on January 31, 2025. On March 15, a TikTok audio featuring the same chorus appeared on Quadeca’s TikTok music page under the title “Godstained”. On March 20, the song was officially announced on X as the single for Vanisher, featuring a short video snippet and a preview of the song. wiki.content: “GODSTAINED” is the lead single off of Quadeca’s album, Vanisher, Horizon Scraper. A snippet of the song was first teased during an Instagram live on January 31, 2025. On March 15, a TikTok audio featuring the same chorus appeared on Quadeca’s TikTok music page under the title “Godstained”. On March 20, the song was officially announced on X as the single for Vanisher, featuring a short video snippet and a preview of the song. The song and its accompanying music video follow Quadeca on a journey at sea, where he discovers a bottle floating in the water. Initially hoping to find a message inside—something that might offer him some insight or answers—he instead sees himself reflected in the discarded object, suggesting that he’s longing to return to the place he left behind. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
